1694810.name: Nightmares to be
1694810.description:
Nightmares to be is a psychological horror set in the year 3039.
Puzzle solving, exploring, and more...
The game's appeal is appointed via visualizing the empty and creepy environment designed specifically to maintain a horrifying experience for the player
as you move forward in levels as Aiden the main protagonist, discover new maps and puzzles with each nightmare you enter and try to solve the mysteries behind it
Face new enemies with each progression made in the story, and find out what happened to Elena his wife after her sudden death within a nightmare.
1694810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
